wire_material._comment: Bilinear plasticity (MAT_PLASTIC_KINEMATIC) for copper wires in LS-DYNA. sigy_MPa: yield stress [MPa], etan_MPa: tangent modulus after yield [MPa].

cablestack._comment_max_parallel: Max MAPDL containers run concurrently for independent load stages (local Docker runs only; each container holds one license seat). 1 = fully sequential.
cablestack._comment_impreg: Impregnation material: 1=epoxy RT, 2=wax RT, 3=epoxy LN2, 4=wax LN2
cablestack._comment_bc: Boundary condition type for displacement_transverse: 'cyclic' (multi-step strain ramp) or 'linear' (single step). Applies only to the displacement_transverse stage.
cablestack._comment_boundary: Boundary type for ALL 4 load stages: 'constrained' = sidewalls fixed perpendicular to load (cable inside a rigid die); 'free' = sidewalls drop their perpendicular constraints and the anchor moves to the loaded-against wall (Poisson-bulge allowed, matches an unconfined Zwick test). 'linear' + 'free' is not implemented.
cablestack._comment_stages: APDL cablestack simulations to run after templates are written. Each entry is a stage name in dependency order; dependencies are auto-included. The `build` stage (0-start.inp) writes base.db (mesh + contacts only, no SOLVE); the four load stages RESUME base.db and apply their own BCs from an UNDEFORMED state. Available: build (0-start.inp), displacement_transverse (00-restart-transverse.inp), displacement_radial (00-restart-radial.inp), pressure_transverse (00-restart-pressure.inp), pressure_radial (00-restart-pressure-radial.inp). Empty list = generate .inp files only, do not launch MAPDL. --no-cablestack overrides this to [].
cablestack._comment_x_cab_margin: Extra margin added to x_cab (half cable width) in mm
cablestack._comment_mesh_size: Reference element size for impregnation and insulation free-mesh [um] at D_Strand = 0.85 mm. Applied size scales as value * (D_Strand / 0.85).
cablestack._comment_strand_mesh_size: Reference element size for strand areas free-mesh [um] at D_Strand = 0.85 mm. Applied size scales as value * (D_Strand / 0.85).
cablestack._comment_pressure: Pressure loading (used by both pressure_transverse via 5-BC-pressure.inp and pressure_radial via 5-BC-radial.inp; also the -free siblings). Forces (peak_force_N, min_force_N) are converted to pressure via area = 2*x_cab * gauge_length_mm*1e-3. ramp_pressures_MPa: fixed intermediate peaks applied directly as SFL [MPa]. Cycle: ramp0, unload, ramp1, unload, ..., rampN, peak, unload.

compression_box._comment: Compression box simulation (workflow step 9, opt-in): 3D parent MAG box solve -> .rmg->VTU -> field tables interpolated onto strand centers -> one-turn 2D submodel (one case per stack cross-section) -> strain/Ic analysis. Needs the step-7 conformal-mesh geometry. Force-run with --compbox, or standalone on the latest run with --compbox-only.
compression_box._comment_solver: 'local' = Docker MAPDL container (same compose service as cablestack), 'hpc' = SSH-reachable SLURM cluster (default ETH Euler; override via HPC_HOST/HPC_USER/HPC_REMOTE_BASE env vars; one job per solve; needs SSH key). The --hpc CLI flag forces 'hpc'.
compression_box._comment_measurement: SINGLE SOURCE for the loading schedule AND the analysis reference: a BOX9.txt-style table (whitespace-separated columns: peak pressure [MPa], Ic under load [A], Ic after unload [A or NaN]; row 1 = baseline/virgin). At staging time compbox_stage.py generates the interleaved load/unload nsteps/totalCurr/pres_pusher block from it and writes it into BOTH the parent box deck (loading_schedule.inp) and 5-BC-submodel.inp (sentinel block), so they cannot drift. Bare names resolve against scripts/apdl/parentmodel/compbox/; absolute paths work too. Audit: <run>/APDL/compbox/loading_schedule.json.
compression_box._comment_nsteps: Optional cap on the number of loadsteps (0 = all pairs from the measurement table). Use an even value to keep load/unload pairs intact, e.g. 14 to stop after the 7th pressure level.
compression_box._comment_analysis: Run complete_analysis.py + ic_calculator.py after the submodel solve.
compression_box._comment_impreg: Impregnation material for the submodel (1=epoxy RT, 2=wax RT, 3=epoxy LN2, 4=wax LN2). Defaults to cablestack.impreg when omitted.
compression_box._comment_local: Docker solve resources: CPUs and memory per MPI rank [MB].
compression_box._comment_hpc: SLURM --ntasks for both the parent MAG and submodel jobs.

wire._comment: RVE sub-element parameters Convention: centre -> bronze -> Nb3Sn -> Nb barrier -> [D_CORE_EQ_UM] -> Cu sleeve -> outer hex. D_CORE_EQ_UM is the Nb-barrier-outer equivalent diameter (= sub-element diameter). CU_SLEEVE_THICKNESS_UM is the radial Cu spacing from D_CORE_EQ to the outer hex; sets pitch independent of CU_NONCU. CU_NONCU is informational/check only -- the geometric Cu/non-Cu is computed from (A_wire - N_NB3SN*A_subelement)/(N_NB3SN*A_subelement). BRONZE_FRAC is the bronze area fraction inside the Nb3Sn hex.
Clone of SMACC_HF (the former SMACCHF preset). RVE sub-element parameters.
